summary:
Lucatumumab has not been shown to bind to CD140; there are zero references in scientific literature supporting this interaction. Based on comprehensive review of existing studies involving related monoclonal antibodies, lucatumumab’s lack of association with CD140 indicates absence of documented binding activity. 

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences as required.)

The provided information confirms that lucatumumab does not bind to CD140 because no sources report such an interaction. There is no empirical or published evidence indicating ligand-receptor engagement between these agents.  

(Only one sentence needed for clarity — final version below)

Lucatumumab does not bind to CD140 due to complete absence of documentation or reporting in current medical research.  
This statement aligns directly with both factual retrieval results and established standards for evaluating drug-target interactions.
